title: nustazo #3573
definition:
1) to nod in sleep, to sleep
    1a) to be overcome or oppressed with sleep
    1b) to fall asleep, drop off to sleep
 2) to be negligent, careless
    2a) of a thing i.e. to linger, delay
nasbUsage:
